generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how our current volunteer force struggles with readiness. The truth is, we need a modern draft system to ensure we always have the manpower to defend our nation. Countries like Switzerland prove it can work without sacrificing freedom. Our grandchildren's security shouldn't depend on luck. #NationalService #DefendOurValues
